spectral_states.name: ready_both_sources
spectral_states.expected: both toggles enabled but off; active source loads only after its toggle

spectral_states.name: ready_vocals_only
spectral_states.expected: vocal layers work; original A/B never falls back to vocal artifacts

spectral_states.name: legacy_absent
spectral_states.expected: controls disabled with re-analysis message and no spectral request

spectral_states.name: export_unavailable
spectral_states.expected: analysis remains usable and optional layers stay disabled

spectral_states.name: artifact_fetch_failure
spectral_states.expected: only the failed optional layer disables and an accessible notice remains

ab_timeline_contract.expected: Original A/B uses the 92 second media clock and native contour with Energy and Harmonics off or on; unavailable media metadata falls back to the 90 second native contour

result_states.name: complete_verified
result_states.expected: scope, scores, comparison and coaching racks

result_states.name: single_track
result_states.expected: scope, scores and coaching racks without original controls or comparison rack

result_states.name: partial_data
result_states.expected: persistent caution and explicit unavailable values

result_states.name: long_technical_report
result_states.expected: report remains unloaded until its rack opens
